text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hold the phone... I think I might actually be in
super good condition today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I wanna win... No, not just that. I will win today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I mean, nothing's ever guaranteed, but I've just
got a feeling victory's mine, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You'd better brace yourself, 'cause I'm gonna
move you to tears when I pass that finish line
today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I'm gonna move you to tears, then help
you wipe 'em away! Okay, laters!
